message:
fix(history): use atomic SQL json_set for replay count increment

Replace read-modify-write pattern with single atomic SQL statement using
json_set() to prevent race conditions when multiple concurrent requests
increment the replay count.

Before: SELECT -> modify in JS -> UPDATE (race window)
After:  UPDATE with json_set + COALESCE + json_extract (atomic)

The COALESCE handles null input columns, and CAST ensures the arithmetic
works correctly. Removed the debug log that showed the count since we
no longer read it before updating.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
